full_text:
Zhou Fang (Ziyu) 周魴 (子魚)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Fang (周魴), styledZiyu (子魚), was born in Wu. Trapped Cao Xiu, allowing the Wu army to score a great victory. Zhou Fang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhou Fang lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
